stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true regarding the relationship between moisture content, precipitation type and the resultant effects on visibility?

options.a: Visibility in precipitation with snow flakes is worse than in rain.
options.b: Visibility in a shower with blowing snow is better than in heavy rain.
options.c: Visibility in heavy snow is better than in drizzle with small water droplets.
options.d: Regardless of the moisture content, the visibility in rain is worse than in snow.
